title: lululemon Expands Its Footwear Offerings with New Casual and Performance Styles, Including the Brand’s First-Ever Men’s Collection | lululemon
snippet:
NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--
Today lululemon (NASDAQ:LULU) revealed its 2024 spring and summer footwear offering with new casual and performance innovations, including the brand’s first men’s collection. lululemon’s debut casual sneaker, cityverse, will be the first new style to launch, starting on February 13. lululemon also revealed new running models: beyondfeel and beyondfeel trail, which will officially launch on March 19 and in May, respectively. The collection will be available, in both men’s and women’s styles, online and in select stores across North America, Europe and China Mainland.

This press release features multimedia. View the full release here: [...] Lululemon – link to home page

Open and close mobile menu

# lululemon Expands Its Footwear Offerings with New Casual and Performance Styles, Including the Brand’s First-Ever Men’s Collection

Feb 1, 2024

The innovative designs are engineered with a focus on fit and feel and will be available in both men’s and women’s styles

The cityverse sneaker launches February 13, the beyondfeel running shoe launches March 19 [...] The brand plans to launch additional footwear innovations, including the Restfeel Sandal, throughout the year including new material iterations, across the product line. For further information on lululemon footwear, visit 

About lululemon

lululemon (NASDAQ:LULU) is a technical athletic apparel, footwear, and accessories company for yoga, running, training, and most other activities, creating transformational products and experiences that build meaningful connections, unlocking greater possibility and wellbeing for all. Setting the bar in innovation of fabrics and functional designs, lululemon works with yogis and athletes in local communities around the world for continuous research and product feedback. For more information, visit lululemon.com.

Forward Looking Statement
